name: Lucsious Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a medium bowl, stir together 2 cups flour and 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons powdered sugar.
3. Cut in the margarine until crumbly.
4. Pat the dough into a 15 by 10 inch non-stick baking pan.
5. Bake the crust for 10 to 15 minutes, or until set.
6. Cool, then sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons powdered sugar.
7. Cut into 48 squares.
WW: 1 fat, 1 brush, 60 optional cals... Per serving: 125 cal, 2 g protein, 5 g fat, 18 g carbs, 35 mg cholesterol, 86 mg sodium
